creator: bjfilipek@gmail.com
text:
Greetings Mark, thank you for all your help! 

I had been running 13.2 for nearly a year with the microSD card in the regular MicroSD card slot. I first discovered the issue when I used freebsd-update to upgrade to 13.3. After I had no luck booting it I downloaded 14.1-RELEASE and DDd it to another card and attempted to boot it. Same result so then I downloaded 14.0-RELEASE and have just been using that. As far as I remember I never did try booting it using a USB microSD card adapter.

I'm running one of the 2GB versions of Raspberry Pi 4. Not sure which EEPROM version is installed. Which log file were you able to extract the bootloader version info from? The machine has never run Raspberry Pi OS which I'm assuming is needed to update the EEPROM. I can further take a look at it next time I have a chance. 

Thank you again for looking into this!
